lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਮੈ ਹਿਰਡ ਪਲਾਸ ਸੰਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਬੁਹੀਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mil satasangat param pad paaeaa mai hiradd palaas sang har buheea |1|
lines.english: Joining the Society of the Saints, I have obtained the supreme status. I am just a castor-oil tree, made fragrant by their association. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਜਗੰਨਾਥ ਜਗਦੀਸ ਗੁਸਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: jap jaganaath jagadees guseea |
lines.english: Meditate on the Lord of the Universe, the Master of the world, the Lord of creation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਣਿ ਪਰੇ ਸੇਈ ਜਨ ਉਬਰੇ ਜਿਉ ਪ੍ਰਹਿਲਾਦ ਉਧਾਰਿ ਸਮਈਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saran pare seee jan ubare jiau prahilaad udhaar sameea |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Those humble beings who seek the Lord's Sanctuary are saved, like Prahlaad; they are emancipated and merge with the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਰ ਅਠਾਰਹ ਮਹਿ ਚੰਦਨੁ ਊਤਮ ਚੰਦਨ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਸਭ ਚੰਦਨੁ ਹੁਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhaar atthaarah meh chandan aootam chandan nikatt sabh chandan hueea |
lines.english: Of all plants, the sandalwood tree is the most sublime. Everything near the sandalwood tree becomes fragrant like sandalwood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਕੂੜੇ ਊਭ ਸੁਕ ਹੂਏ ਮਨਿ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ਵਿਛੁੜਿ ਦੂਰਿ ਗਈਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: saakat koorre aoobh suk hooe man abhimaan vichhurr door geea |2|
lines.english: The stubborn, false faithless cynics are dried up; their egotistical pride separates them far from the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗਤਿ ਮਿਤਿ ਕਰਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਜਾਣੈ ਸਭ ਬਿਧਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਬਨਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: har gat mit karataa aape jaanai sabh bidh har har aap baneea |
lines.english: Only the Creator Lord Himself knows the state and condition of everyone; the Lord Himself makes all the arrangements.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟੇ ਸੁ ਕੰਚਨੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਜੋ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੁ ਮਿਟੈ ਨ ਮਿਟਈਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jis satigur bhette su kanchan hovai jo dhur likhiaa su mittai na mitteea |3|
lines.english: One who meets the True Guru is transformed into gold. Whatever is pre-ordained, is not erased by erasing. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤਨ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਪਾਵੈ ਸਾਗਰ ਭਗਤਿ ਭੰਡਾਰ ਖੁਲੑਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: ratan padaarath guramat paavai saagar bhagat bhanddaar khulaeea |
lines.english: The treasure of jewels is found in the ocean of the Guru's Teachings. The treasure of devotional worship is opened to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਇਕ ਸਰਧਾ ਉਪਜੀ ਮੈ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਕਹਤੇ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਨ ਭਈਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: gur charanee ik saradhaa upajee mai har gun kahate tripat na bheea |4|
lines.english: Focused on the Guru's Feet, faith wells up within me; chanting the Glorious Praises of the Lord, I hunger for more. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਰ ਬਾਰ ਖਿਨੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਪਲੁ ਕਹੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਰੁ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਪਰੈ ਪਰਈਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: baar baar khin khin pal kaheeai har paar na paavai parai pareea |5|
lines.english: Time and time again, each and every moment and instant, I express it. I cannot find the Lord's limits; He is the farthest of the far. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਮ ਬੈਰਾਗੁ ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਏ ਮੈ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਕਹਤੇ ਭਾਵਨੀ ਕਹੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: param bairaag nit nit har dhiaae mai har gun kahate bhaavanee kaheea |
lines.english: I am totally detached, continually, continuously meditating on the Lord; chanting the Glorious Praises of the Lord, I express my love for Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਤ ਬੇਦ ਪੁਰਾਣ ਪੁਕਾਰਹਿ ਧਰਮੁ ਕਰਹੁ ਖਟੁ ਕਰਮ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: saasat bed puraan pukaareh dharam karahu khatt karam drirreea |
lines.english: The Shaastras, the Vedas and the Puraanas advise righteous actions, and the performance of the six religious rituals.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਨਾਮੇ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਵਹੁ ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: naam japahu naame gat paavahu simrit saasatr naam drirreea |
lines.english: So chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and through the Naam, find emancipation. The Simritees and Shaastras recommend the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਪਾਖੰਡਿ ਭਰਮਿ ਵਿਗੂਤੇ ਲੋਭ ਲਹਰਿ ਨਾਵ ਭਾਰਿ ਬੁਡਈਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: manamukh paakhandd bharam vigoote lobh lehar naav bhaar buddeea |6|
lines.english: The hypocritical, self-willed manmukhs are ruined by doubt; in the waves of greed, their boat is heavily loaded, and it sinks. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਜਾਇ ਤ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਰਚੈ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਈਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: haumai jaae ta niramal hovai guramukh parachai param pad peea |7|
lines.english: Eradicating egotism, one becomes pure. The Gurmukh is inspired, and obtains the supreme status. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੰਤ ਵਜਾਏ ਵਾਜਹਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਤੁ ਰਾਹਿ ਚਲਈਆ ॥੮॥੨॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak jant vajaae vaajeh jit bhaavai tith raeh chaleea |8|2|5|
lines.english: O Nanak, we are the instruments upon which He plays; as He wills, so is the path we take. ||8||2||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਵਰਨੁ ਰੂਪੁ ਸਭੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਲਾਵਹਿ ਸੇ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: eihu jag varan roop sabh teraa jit laaveh se karam kameea |
lines.english: This world, with its colors and forms, is all Yours, O Lord; as You attach us, so do we do our deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅਗਮ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਹਉ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਤਿ ਪੁਰਖਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh agam agochar dhiaaeaa hau bal bal satigur sat purakheea |
lines.english: The Gurmukh meditates on the Inaccessible, Unfathomable Lord. I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice to the True Guru, the True Primal Being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੇਰੈ ਪ੍ਰਾਣਿ ਵਸਾਏ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਈਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: raam naam merai praan vasaae satigur paras har naam sameea |1|
lines.english: He has brought the Lord's Name to dwell upon my breath of life; meeting with the True Guru, I am absorbed into the Lord's Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਕੀ ਟੇਕ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਟਿਕਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: jan kee ttek har naam ttikeea |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord is the only Support of His humble servants.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਧਰ ਲਾਗਾ ਜਾਵਾ ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਦਰੁ ਲਹੀਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kee dhar laagaa jaavaa gur kirapaa te har dar laheea |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I shall live under the protection of the True Guru. By Guru's Grace, I shall attain the Court of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਕਰਮ ਕੀ ਧਰਤੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਥਿ ਮਥਿ ਤਤੁ ਕਢਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: eihu sareer karam kee dharatee guramukh math math tat kadteea |
lines.english: This body is the field of karma; the Gurmukhs plow and work it, and harvest the essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਸਨਿ ਦਾਸ ਦਾਸ ਹੋਇ ਰਹੀਐ ਜੋ ਜਨ ਰਾਮ ਭਗਤ ਨਿਜ ਭਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: daasan daas daas hoe raheeai jo jan raam bhagat nij bheea |
lines.english: Become the slave of the slave of the slave, of that humble being who has become the devotee of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲੁ ਜਵੇਹਰ ਨਾਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸਿਆ ਭਾਂਡੈ ਭਾਉ ਪਵੈ ਤਿਤੁ ਅਈਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: laal javehar naam pragaasiaa bhaanddai bhaau pavai tith aeea |2|
lines.english: The priceless jewel of the Naam becomes manifest, and it pours into their vessels of love. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਬੁਧਿ ਅਰਪਿ ਧਰਉ ਗੁਰ ਆਗੈ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਮੈ ਅਕਥੁ ਕਥਈਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: man budh arap dhrau gur aagai gur parasaadee mai akath katheea |3|
lines.english: I dedicate my mind and intellect, and place them in offering before my Guru; by Guru's Grace, I speak the Unspoken. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਵਿਆਪੇ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਜਲਤ ਤਿਖਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh maaeaa mohi viaape ihu man trisanaa jalat tikheea |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are engrossed in attachment to Maya; their minds are thirsty, burning with desire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਜਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਅਗਨਿ ਬੁਝੀ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਬੁਝਈਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: guramat naam amrit jal paaeaa agan bujhee gur sabad bujheea |4|
lines.english: Following the Guru's Teachings, I have obtained the Ambrosial Water of the Naam, and the fire has been put out. The Word of the Guru's Shabad has put it out. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਨਾਚੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਆਗੈ ਅਨਹਦ ਸਬਦ ਧੁਨਿ ਤੂਰ ਵਜਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man naachai satigur aagai anahad sabad dhun toor vajeea |
lines.english: This mind dances before the True Guru. The unstruck sound current of the Shabad resounds, vibrating the celestial melody.
